name: og-share
purpose: Open Graph para páginas do app deployado — exibido ao compartilhar links no WhatsApp, Twitter, etc.
prompt: Open Graph share image for a web app called Voca. Background: deep forest green #0d2218. Top-left: small waveform icon (5 mint bars) + wordmark 'Voca' in geometric sans-serif, near-white. Center: large headline 'Turn voice into context.' in near-white, display typeface, left-aligned. Below headline: tagline 'Transcreva. Otimize. Cole no LLM.' in electric mint #4ade80, smaller. Bottom row: three small pill badges — 'OpenAI Whisper', 'GPT', 'Next.js' — dark surface with mint text. Bottom-right: domain 'voca.vercel.app' in muted white. No photos. Flat, editorial, code-tool aesthetic. Consistent with the social-preview card.
negative_prompt: gradient, 3D, photos, people, mascot, bright background, cluttered

model_hints.dalle3: Aspect ratio ~1.9:1. Dark background. Flat design.
